recommendations.title: Almost Home
recommendations.overview: A group of aliens searching for a new planet on which to make home, with little success. Promotional short for Dreamworks Animation's forthcoming feature, Home.

recommendations.title: LEGO: The Adventures of Clutch Powers
recommendations.overview: Clutch Powers ventures on a mission assigned to him by his boss to solve the chaos that occurred on the Space Police prison planet.

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.

recommendations.title: Doppelgänger
recommendations.overview: A planet is discovered in the same orbit as Earth's but is located on the exact opposite side of the sun, making it not visible from Earth. The European Space Exploration Council decide to send American astronaut Glenn Ross and British scientist John

recommendations.title: Escape from Planet Earth
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Adventure, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Astronaut Scorch Supernova finds himself caught in a trap when he responds to an SOS from a notoriously dangerous alien planet.

recommendations.title: A Shaun the Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Adventure, Animation, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organization can capture her.

recommendations.title: Blush
recommendations.overview: When a horticulturalist-astronaut crashes onto a desolate planet, he encounters an ethereal visitor and discovers the joy of building a new life—realizing the universe has delivered something astonishing.

recommendations.title: Doraemon the Movie: Nobita's Little Star Wars 2021
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Adventure, Family, Fantasy, Comedy
recommendations.overview: During summer vacation Nobita picks up a small rocket containing Papi, a palm-sized alien president escaping rebels on his home planet Pirika.

recommendations.title: Arif V 216
recommendations.overview: After 8 years, Arif's old friend 216 from planet GORA pays a visit to Earth.Together they go on a quest where they'll be visiting 60's.
